The following events took place in approximately '''13,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*Beginnings of the [[Ailon (species)/Legends|Ailon]] military tradition.<ref name="Galaxy Guide">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref>
*The [[Pella Compact]] leads the first settlers to the planet [[Pelagon]].<ref name="Player's Guide">''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''</ref>
*The [[Herglic Trade Empire]] joins the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] circa 13,000 BBY.<ref name="atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
